name: Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix the butter with the granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract and baking powder.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, stirring just until combined.
6. Pour the batter into a 9 x 13 inch foil-lined pan.
7. Bake for 15 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
8. In another bowl, mix together the confectioners' sugar and lemon juice.
9. Spread the glaze over the hot crust.
10. Cool completely before serving.
